q: A student is learning Python in the interactive interpreter mode. The student issues the commands: >>> devicenames=["RT1", "RT2", "SW1", "SW2"] >>> devicenames[-1] What is the result?
A developer needs to check the version of the running Python package. Which command should the developer use?
A user issues the apt-get upgrade command to update system files in a Ubuntu Linux system and receives an error message of "permission denied." What should the user do to complete the task?
opts: Issue the sudo apt-get install command.
Issue the allow apt-get upgrade command.
Issue the sudo apt-get upgrade command
a: Issue the sudo apt-get upgrade command

q: What command is used to rename a file in a Linux system?
A network engineer needs to review the status of all network interfaces of a server running a Linux operating system. The engineer enters the command ifconfig -a. What is the result of this command?
opts: The ARP table of the computer will be displayed.
Both active and inactive interfaces will display information.
All active interfaces will display information.
The host routing table will be displayed.
a: Both active and inactive interfaces will display information.

q: A user issues a series of Linux commands as shown. (omitted)$ pwd /home/devasc/labs/ansible/backups (omitted)$ cd ../.. Which directory is the current directory after the cd command is entered?

A student new to Python is working in the interactive interpreter mode. The student issues the command: >>> ipAddress = {"R1":"10.1.1.1","R2":"10.2.2.1","R3":"10.3.3.1"} Which Python expression can be used to retrieve the IP address of R2?
A student is learning Python in the interactive interpreter mode. The student issues the command: >>> type(True) What is the data type reported by Python?
A Linux system administrator is searching the passwd file for any username that starts with a digit. Which grep command should the administrator use?
What is displayed after the following code is entered into a Python interpreter? addition = 22 +10 print(addition)
opts: nothing ( because the print command is wrong)

A student is learning Python in the interactive interpreter mode. The student issues the commands: >>> y=2 >>> y*3 6 >>> 'Test'*y What is the result?
opts: TypeError: A string type cannot be multiplied by an integer.

q: What is the output when the following code is entered into a Python program interpreter? [1,2,4,5] + [3,6]

A student is learning Python using the interactive interpreter mode. The student issues the commands: >>> routers=[] >>> switches=[] >>> devices=["RT1", "RT2", "RT3", "SW1", "SW2", "SW3"] >>> devices=devices + ["RT4", "SW4"] >>> for i in devices: if "R" in i: routers.append(i) else: switches.append(i) >>> switches What is the result?
A system administrator issues the apt-get upgrade command on a Linux operating system. What is the purpose of this command?
opts: A specific application named upgrade will be installed.
The remote repository of applications and dependencies will be updated to the latest version.
Every application installed will update itself to the latest version.
Operating system updates are downloaded and will be installed.
a: Every application installed will update itself to the latest version.

q: A user enters the commands as shown. What is the result after the mv command is entered? devasc@labvm:~/Documents$ pwd /home/devasc/Documents devasc@labvm:~/Documents$ mv myfile.sh ../Desktop/myfile2.sh
opts: The file myfile.sh is copied and renamed to myfile2.sh in the current directory.
The file myfile.sh is copied to the /home/devasc/Desktop directory and renamed as myfile2.sh.
The file myfile.sh is moved to the /home/devasc/Desktop directory and renamed as myfile2.sh.
The file myfile.sh is copied to the /home/devasc/Desktop directory and replaces the file myfile2.sh.
a: The file myfile.sh is moved to the /home/devasc/Desktop directory and renamed as myfile2.sh.

q: A system administrator of a Linux server is searching the passwd file for the username taylor that appears at the beginning of the line. Which grep command should the administrator use?
A system administrator attempts to determine what is causing a computer to perform slower than normal. The administrator issues the ps command. What is displayed by this command?
A student is learning Python and is reviewing a Python script as follows:
opts: when the input is a string
when the input is a float number
when the if statement is false
when the first print statement fails
a: when the if statement is false

q: Which Python command creates a conditional control structure?

A Linux administrator is attempting to use a terminal to configure the network interface card on a computer. The administrator receives a message that the administrator does not have necessary permissions to perform the configuration. What should be done prior to the configuration command?
opts: change the chmod permissions on the network configuration file

q: What Linux command is used to display the contents of the current directory?
A user issues the Linux command ls -l myfile.sh to check the permission of the file myfile.sh. Which two statements describe the permissions assigned to the file? (Choose two.)
opts: Any user in the self group can read, modify, and execute the file.
The user with the user ID of self can modify the file.
The user with the user ID of devasc can modify the file.
All users can execute the file.
Any user in the test group can execute the file.
a: The user with the user ID of self can modify the file.
Any user in the test group can execute the file.
